name: MindChain connection surface map
purpose: One machine-readable map of every current MindChain surface, platform artifact, trust boundary, and next connection path.

surfaces.label: Mind Query
surfaces.trust_boundary: requires independent finalized-state quorum; public executors may see prompts; SOFT, ANCHORED, and ASSURED describe execution finality rather than truth; no direct fallback

surfaces.label: World Wide Mind
surfaces.trust_boundary: private drafts stay in browser; public/link objects sync only through explicit local API calls

surfaces.label: MindLink renderer
surfaces.trust_boundary: renders public schema objects; does not grant edit/unpublish authority

surfaces.label: MindLink v0 schema
surfaces.trust_boundary: schema validation only; not a persistence guarantee

surfaces.label: MindScan explorer
surfaces.trust_boundary: must bind chain ID, genesis hash, unsafe head, justified state, and finalized state before public claims

surfaces.label: Network dashboard
surfaces.trust_boundary: only sanitized validator, indexer, observer, consensus, and compute telemetry is public; operator RPC and bearer credentials remain private

surfaces.label: Compute Market
surfaces.trust_boundary: untrusted requester code remains blocked until sandbox and challenge verification pass

surfaces.label: Mind Market
surfaces.trust_boundary: asset and swap actions must stay separate from wallet custody and chain finality claims

platforms.label: Web / public testnet
platforms.next: Retain the valueless testnet boundary until independent operators and production validator keys exist.

platforms.label: Windows wallet installer
platforms.next: Replace development signing with production-trusted code signing and signed update metadata.

platforms.label: macOS host/wallet
platforms.next: Apple Developer ID notarized universal package and launchd service wrapper.

platforms.label: Linux host/wallet
platforms.next: systemd package, signed repository metadata, and independent builder evidence.

platforms.label: Android wallet app
platforms.next: Produce a release-signed Android artifact and complete independent device testing.

platforms.label: iOS wallet app
platforms.next: Produce a TestFlight-signed iOS artifact and complete independent device testing.

connection_ladder: Choose the surface: contribute, verify, explore, operate, compute, market, or install.
Check the displayed trust boundary before crossing into another app.
For chain-connected apps, verify chain ID and genesis hash before submitting actions.
For private data, prefer private backup or encrypted backup once available; never use public MindLinks as control authority.
blocked_before_public_everywhere: independent validator operators and production keys
